name: IR Minimality Proof

claims.necessity: All 6 ops are irreplaceable for KAN compilation
claims.sufficiency: Any KAN forward pass is expressible as DAG of 6 ops
claims.non_extensibility: Adding more ops breaks SVNN Condition 1

key_insight: The 6-op IR is not an arbitrary design choice---it is the MAXIMAL VERIFIABLE SUBSET of neural network operations for KAN compilation: the largest set for which both Theorem 1 (compiler correctness) and Theorem 2 (SVNN error bound) hold simultaneously.
